actingProfile.summary: Reliable default Coding Coach companion with calm mechanical acting.

stateGestures.idle: calibrated standby with tiny screen blink and antenna pulse
stateGestures.reading: face-screen scan line while studying an abstract diagnostic panel
stateGestures.running: precise alternating mechanical hand typing on a tiny floating keyboard
stateGestures.judging: neutral diagnostic panel with slow cyan light pulse
stateGestures.success: compact confirmation hop with tiny cyan/yellow sparkles
stateGestures.needs-fix: small amber maintenance notice and supportive raised-hand hint

transitionGestures.reading_to_running: diagnostic panel lowers and keyboard rises
transitionGestures.running_to_judging: keyboard folds into diagnostic panel from a sync typing pose
transitionGestures.judging_to_success: panel fades as antenna light brightens into the hop
transitionGestures.judging_to_needs-fix: panel fades into amber alert dot and hand hint

actingProfile.summary: Curious study-buddy pet whose acting comes from ears, tail, paws, and body weight.

stateGestures.idle: attentive tail sway with one ear flick and blink
stateGestures.reading: lean-in curiosity toward tiny abstract notebook or magnifier
stateGestures.running: fast front-paw typing with rhythmic tail flick
stateGestures.judging: sits upright, tail wraps in, ears steady, watches a small status panel
stateGestures.success: quick springy hop with perked ears and happy tail curve
stateGestures.needs-fix: ears dip slightly, paw raises beside a small amber coaching bubble

transitionGestures.reading_to_running: closes notebook with a paw and drops into keyboard stance
transitionGestures.running_to_judging: waits for paw-typing sync pose, then sits upright as tail wraps in
transitionGestures.judging_to_success: tail pops upward first, then springy hop starts
transitionGestures.judging_to_needs-fix: ears dip, amber bubble appears, paw raises

actingProfile.summary: Hovering scanner pet whose acting comes from projection, scan rings, side fins, and core light.

stateGestures.idle: calm vertical hover with fin stabilization and core-light pulse
stateGestures.reading: translucent cyan projection panel with soft scan arc
stateGestures.running: projection keyboard, thruster-like fin pulses, compact orbiting data particles
stateGestures.judging: near-still hover with rotating scan ring and slow core pulse
stateGestures.success: small upward hover flourish with quarter-turn and bright core pulse
stateGestures.needs-fix: slight descent with gentle amber caution ring or dot

transitionGestures.reading_to_running: projection scan sheet folds into projection keyboard
transitionGestures.running_to_judging: projection keyboard collapses into scan ring from propulsion sync pose
transitionGestures.judging_to_success: scan ring brightens into success orbit flourish
transitionGestures.judging_to_needs-fix: scan ring slows, shifts to amber caution ring, and descends slightly

qaGates: Same state across pets must not share the same pose skeleton.
Bytecat must use ear, tail, paw, and body-weight acting in every state.
Nono must use hover, projection, scan ring, side fins, and core-light acting in every state.
Bluebot must remain the most stable and least distracting pet.
Every state must preserve the existing Agent event meaning.
reading, running, and judging must be distinguishable at 64x64.
needs-fix must stay supportive and non-shaming.
No text, code, logos, screenshots, hidden-case references, or pass/fail marks.
All important pixels must stay inside the central 80% of the canvas.
Loop boundaries and transition entry frames must be checked in the viewer.
